chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No. D-1304 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 08.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Farooque Ali Jatoi, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Zulifqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General a/w Ziadullah Laghari, Divisional Forest Officer Sukkur ***************** Statement filed by Respondent No.6 is taken on record. Learned AAG submits that the petitioner is not appearing before the Divisional Forest Officer, Sukkur, and has also failed to submit the required documents. Upon this, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner shall approach office of the Divisional Forest Officer, Sukkur, and submit the necessary documents. In view of the above, the present petition stands disposed of with direction to the petitioner to approach the concerned office along with the required documents. In the meantime, the concerned office shall process the petitioner’s case within 30 days and submit a report to this Court through the Assistant Registrar for perusal. JUDGE JUDGE M.Ali*
